metadata.project: CDC ATS - AI-Powered Applicant Tracking System

build_plan.day_1: P0 features (12) + all core engines (15) + high-priority P1 features
build_plan.day_2: Remaining P1 features + integration testing + UI polish

usage_instructions.ui_engineer: Use 'ui_route' and 'api_endpoints' to build pages. Each feature maps to a route and consumes the listed API endpoints.
usage_instructions.backend_engineer: Build the 'core_engines' first. Each engine defines all endpoints. Features reference these endpoints.
usage_instructions.testing_engineer: Use 'api_endpoints' per feature to write integration tests. 'build_status' indicates expected completeness.

core_engines.name: Platform Core Engine
core_engines.description: Unified data model, requisitions, tenants, skills ontology

core_engines.name: Security & Privacy Framework
core_engines.description: Zero-trust security, data residency, access control, encryption, prompt injection defense

endpoints.desc: Validate and route tool calls securely

core_engines.name: Bias & Fairness Engine
core_engines.description: Bias detection, fairness monitoring, adverse impact analysis, proxy detection, drift monitoring

core_engines.name: Compliance & Governance Engine
core_engines.description: Audit trails, evidence packages, jurisdiction rules, policy enforcement, regulatory reporting

core_engines.name: AI Explainability Layer
core_engines.description: AI decision explanations, model governance, transparency, confidence scoring

endpoints.desc: AI use disclosure and mode labeling

core_engines.name: Analytics & Reporting Engine
core_engines.description: Pipeline health, bottleneck detection, fairness analytics, real-time dashboards

core_engines.name: Candidate Experience Hub
core_engines.description: Candidate communication, concierge, portals, transparency, appeals

core_engines.name: Interview Management System
core_engines.description: Structured interviews, panel coordination, feedback, coaching, scorecards

core_engines.name: Screening & Assessment Engine
core_engines.description: Resume parsing, skills matching, blind screening, assessments, fraud detection

core_engines.name: Sourcing & Talent Attraction Engine
core_engines.description: Candidate sourcing, Boolean search, talent pools, outreach

core_engines.name: Decision & Offer Management Engine
core_engines.description: Hiring decisions, consensus, offers, compensation, negotiations

core_engines.name: Integration & Workflow Hub
core_engines.description: HRIS sync, approval workflows, SLA enforcement, API integrations

endpoints.desc: Publish hiring event to HR stack

core_engines.name: Scheduling & Coordination Engine
core_engines.description: Interview scheduling, timezone management, no-show prevention, accessibility

core_engines.name: Internal Mobility & Workforce Planning Engine
core_engines.description: Internal mobility, skills matching, career paths, workforce planning

features.name: Protected-Trait Proxy Detector
features.description: Automatically detects when hiring decisions might be influenced by protected characteristics like age, race, or gender, helping prevent illegal discrimination.

features.name: Human Decision Gate on All Consequential Actions
features.description: Requires humans to review and approve all significant hiring decisions, ensuring AI doesn't make critical choices without human oversight.

features.name: Unified ATS + CRM + scheduling + analytics on a single data model
features.description: Combines candidate profiles, recruiter conversations, interview scheduling, and hiring analytics in one unified system for seamless workflow.

features.name: End-to-End Requisition Orchestration
features.description: Automates the entire hiring process from job posting through offer, coordinating all steps and tracking progress end-to-end.

features.name: Secure Tool Router with Safe Action Semantics
features.description: Routes candidate data securely through systems with strict controls, preventing unauthorized access or misuse of sensitive information.

features.name: Consent First Data Minimization Orchestrator
features.description: Ensures only necessary candidate information is collected and processed with explicit consent, minimizing data exposure.

features.name: API Level Data Residency and Tenant Isolation
features.description: Isolates each company's hiring data separately while enforcing data location rules, preventing cross-tenant leaks.

features.name: Sensitive Data Segregation Vault
features.description: Stores highly sensitive data like SSNs and background check results in a separate secure vault with restricted access.

features.name: Retention and Deletion Orchestrator
features.description: Automatically deletes candidate records according to legal retention policies, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations.

features.name: Fine-Grained Access and Just-in-Time Review
features.description: Controls who can access candidate data and requires real-time approval for sensitive information access, creating audit trails.

features.name: Prompt Injection and Output Safety Firewall
features.description: Protects against malicious attempts to manipulate AI decisions through prompt injection, ensuring AI integrity.

features.name: Enterprise-grade security architecture with zero-trust design
features.description: Implements defense-in-depth security architecture where every system is verified and nothing is assumed safe.

features.name: Agent and Model Governance Console
features.description: Gives administrators centralized control over which AI models and agents are approved for use in hiring.

features.name: Explainable Hiring Decisions Layer
features.description: Provides transparent explanations for AI hiring recommendations, helping recruiters understand why candidates are ranked a certain way.

features.name: Explainability Ledger for Every AI Suggestion
features.description: Creates a detailed log of every suggestion made by AI, showing reasoning and evidence for each recommendation.

features.name: Job-Criterion Trace Map
features.description: Maps which job requirements drove each AI decision, showing if the decision was based on relevant qualifications.

features.name: Reason-Code Compiler
features.description: Compiles plain-English reasons for every hiring decision that can be shared with candidates or used in compliance audits.

features.name: Prompt-to-Action Transparency Panel
features.description: Shows recruiters exactly how AI interpreted the hiring instructions and which factors it weighted most heavily.

features.name: Embedded Model and Prompt Cards
features.description: Displays the AI model, version, and exact prompt used for each decision, creating transparency and accountability.

features.name: Hiring AI Model Registry
features.description: Maintains a catalog of all AI models used in hiring with their approval status and deployment history.

features.name: Approved-Model Control Plane
features.description: Controls which approved AI models can be used in live hiring, preventing unapproved or outdated models from running.

features.name: Secure Shadow Evaluation Before Release
features.description: Tests new AI models in production-like conditions before releasing them to recruiters, catching problems early.

features.name: Policy-Bound Model Catalog
features.description: Ensures every AI model used in hiring complies with company policies and legal requirements throughout its lifecycle.

features.name: Human-Readable Decision Summaries
features.description: Converts technical AI reasoning into clear summaries that non-technical people like hiring managers can easily understand.

features.name: Role-Adaptive Explainability Views
features.description: Customizes AI explanations for different users: detailed data for compliance teams, simple summaries for recruiters.

features.name: Explainability Quality Metrics Dashboard
features.description: Tracks how well AI explanations help human decision-makers understand and trust AI recommendations.

features.name: AI Use Disclosure and Mode Labeling
features.description: Clearly labels when AI is being used in hiring and shows the mode, helping candidates understand what's analyzing them.

features.name: Data Provenance And Training Set Registry
features.description: Documents where all training data came from and maintains a searchable registry of what trained each AI model.

features.name: Governance‑Bound Change Management For Models
features.description: Requires formal approval and documentation for all changes to AI models, preventing unauthorized modifications.

features.name: AI Model Versioning and Rollback
features.description: Tracks every version of an AI model and allows rolling back to previous versions if problems are discovered.

features.name: Real-Time Explainability Dashboard (Agentic Flow Visualization)
features.description: Displays a real-time visual dashboard showing how AI and humans are working through the hiring workflow.

features.name: Per-decision explainable rationale
features.description: Provides a clear reason statement for each individual hiring decision that can be shared with candidates.

features.name: Pre-Deployment Bias Testing Suite
features.description: Tests AI models before deployment to ensure they don't discriminate against protected groups.

features.name: Natural Language Decision Justification
features.description: Generates natural explanations for hiring decisions using conversational language instead of technical jargon.

features.name: Agentic Model Governance & Explainability
features.description: Ensures AI agents used in hiring can be governed and understood, with full visibility into their reasoning.

features.name: Explainable AI Ranking
features.description: Ranks candidates while showing step-by-step reasoning for why one candidate scored higher than another.

features.name: Explainable Decision Surfaces
features.description: Visualizes the decision-making surface showing how different qualifications affect candidate scores.

features.name: Continuous Model Drift Monitoring
features.description: Continuously monitors AI performance to catch when models start producing worse results over time.

features.name: Agentic Action Transparency Log
features.description: Creates a log of every action an AI takes in hiring, including what data it accessed and what it decided.

features.name: AI Confidence Banding with Uncertainty Display
features.description: Shows how confident the AI is in each recommendation with visual indicators of uncertainty.

features.name: Counterfactual Rejection Analyzer
features.description: Analyzes rejected candidates to understand what factors led to rejection and if patterns seem fair.

features.name: Human-Readable AI Narrative Summaries
features.description: Summarizes AI reasoning into natural language narratives that explain hiring decisions to non-technical audiences.

features.name: Model Version Snapshot Binding
features.description: Locks hiring decisions to the specific AI version that made them, preventing retroactive changes to explanations.

features.name: AI Override with Accountability Trail
features.description: Allows humans to override AI decisions while recording why they did so and by whom, creating accountability.

features.name: Escalation-Required Edge Cases
features.description: Automatically flags unusual or high-risk decisions that require human escalation and review before proceeding.

features.name: Model Rollback and Emergency Freeze Controls
features.description: Enables quick freezing of an AI model across the system if problems are detected, with fast rollback options.

features.name: Model Card Generation and Disclosure
features.description: Auto-generates detailed documentation about AI models including what they do, their limitations, and performance metrics.

features.name: Audit-Ready Model Versioning
features.description: Maintains a complete audit history of every AI model version ever used in hiring with deployment dates.

features.name: Mandatory Human-in-the-Loop Checkpoints
features.description: Requires mandatory human review at specific points in the hiring workflow, preventing AI-only decisions.

features.name: Consent-Based AI Model Training
features.description: Only trains AI models using candidate data from those who explicitly consented to having their data used.

features.name: Model Card + Versioned Prompt Registry
features.description: Maintains a searchable registry of all AI models and the exact prompts used, versioned for audit compliance.

features.name: Prompt-Level Human Approval Gate for High-Risk Agents
features.description: Requires human approval before high-risk AI agents can execute decisions like rejecting candidates.

features.name: Protected-Attribute Redaction Engine Before Inference
features.description: Removes protected attributes like age and race from candidate profiles before AI sees them, preventing bias.

features.name: Configurable Risk-Threshold Human Approval Gates
features.description: Allows companies to set custom risk thresholds that trigger human approval for decisions above that threshold.

features.name: Model Card Automation
features.description: Automatically creates and maintains updated model documentation without manual effort required.

features.name: Explainable AI with transparent reasoning chains for every recommendation
features.description: Shows every reasoning step the AI took to reach a recommendation, creating a transparent chain of logic.

features.name: Recruiter Agentic Co-Pilot
features.description: An AI assistant that helps recruiters by drafting emails, summarizing candidates, and automating routine hiring tasks.

features.name: Event Sourced Hiring Ledger
features.description: Records every hiring event and decision in an immutable ledger for compliance audits and dispute resolution.

features.name: Org-Wide Hiring Health Dashboard (Agent-Curated)
features.description: A centralized dashboard showing hiring health metrics, bottlenecks, and pace across the entire organization.

features.name: Fairness Metrics Benchmarking
features.description: Compares hiring fairness metrics across teams and roles to identify where bias problems might be emerging.

features.name: Cross-System Decision Correlation
features.description: Analyzes whether different systems are making inconsistent decisions for similar candidates.

features.name: Automated Requisition Velocity Monitoring with Bottleneck Detection
features.description: Automatically identifies and alerts on hiring bottlenecks like interview stages taking too long.

features.name: Automated Requisition Health Scoring with Intervention Playbooks
features.description: Scores each job requisition's health and suggests specific actions to improve hiring speed and quality.

features.name: Dynamic Bottleneck Detection & Recovery
features.description: Detects hiring slowdowns in real-time and suggests recovery actions to get back on track.

features.name: Real-Time Process Telemetry Dashboard
features.description: A live dashboard displaying real-time metrics on hiring velocity, completion rates, and process health.

features.name: Immutable, Tamper-Evident Audit Logs
features.description: Creates audit logs that cannot be altered after creation, proving that hiring decisions were made fairly.

features.name: Automated Bias Audit Scheduling
features.description: Automatically schedules bias audits at regular intervals to ensure ongoing fairness in hiring.

features.name: Adverse Impact Analysis by Stage
features.description: Analyzes whether hiring is having disparate impact on protected groups at each interview stage.

features.name: Override and Justification Logging
features.description: Logs every time a recruiter overrides an AI decision and documents their reason for the override.

features.name: Cross-functional analytics dashboards for finance, executives, and TA ops
features.description: Provides role-specific dashboards for finance, executives, and talent ops teams with their most relevant metrics.

features.name: Real-Time Pipeline Health Dashboard
features.description: Displays current pipeline status in real-time with visibility into stage progression and potential problems.

features.name: Conversational Candidate Concierge (Core feature)
features.description: An AI chatbot that candidates can talk to about their application, interview schedule, and next steps 24/7.

features.name: Multilingual Experience Agent (Premium differentiator)
features.description: Communicates with candidates in their preferred language and understands cultural context of different regions.

features.name: USP: 24/7 Concierge Agent
features.description: A round-the-clock AI concierge that answers candidate questions anytime, improving experience and reducing recruiter load.

features.name: Adaptive Application Experience
features.description: Customizes the application experience for each candidate based on their background and the role requirements.

features.name: Multi-Lingual, Region-Aware Candidate Agent
features.description: Conversations with candidates are conducted in their language and adjusted for regional hiring norms.

features.name: Candidate AI Use Passport
features.description: Candidates receive a document showing which AI was used to evaluate them and how they can request explanation.

features.name: Candidate Explanation and Appeal Center
features.description: A dedicated portal where rejected candidates can get explanations and appeal hiring decisions.

features.name: Transparency-by-Default Interviewing
features.description: Interview processes are conducted with full transparency about when AI is evaluating and what criteria matters.

features.name: Candidate Feedback And Appeal Channel
features.description: Candidates can easily provide feedback on their experience and appeal decisions through a simple channel.

features.name: "Why Was I Rejected?" Candidate Report
features.description: Rejected candidates receive a clear report explaining the key reasons they weren't selected.

features.name: Transparent Application Progress Tracker
features.description: Candidates can track their application status in real-time and see where they are in the interview process.

features.name: Candidate Rights Fulfillment Portal
features.description: Centralized portal where candidates can request their data, privacy rights fulfillment, and other data access requests.

features.name: Candidate AI Transparency Notice Engine
features.description: Automatically sends candidates clear notices when AI is evaluating them and what that means for their application.

features.name: Candidate Data Access and Redress Portal
features.description: Allows candidates to download their data, request corrections, and understand how their information is being used.

features.name: One-Click Appeal to Human Reviewer
features.description: Rejected candidates can click once to escalate their case to a human reviewer for a second opinion.

features.name: Candidate-centric scheduling that optimizes their experience, not just internal efficiency
features.description: Interview scheduling considers candidate availability and preferences first, not just internal team convenience.

features.name: Conversational application that eliminates forms entirely for appropriate roles
features.description: Candidates apply through natural conversation instead of filling out long forms, improving experience and completion rates.

features.name: Real-time transparent status tracking with timeline predictions
features.description: Shows candidates real-time status updates with predictions of when they can expect to hear back next.

features.name: Personalized, multi-channel candidate engagement throughout the lifecycle
features.description: Connects with candidates through email, SMS, and in-app messages at every stage, keeping them informed and engaged throughout the hiring process.

features.name: Automated Requisition-Closure Notifier
features.description: Automatically notifies candidates when a job position closes, providing transparency and reducing confusion about application status.

features.name: Candidate Right-to-Reply Portal
features.description: Allows rejected candidates to submit a formal response or appeal regarding their rejection decision.

features.name: Candidate Appeal Workflow
features.description: Provides a structured workflow for candidates to formally challenge hiring decisions, ensuring fair reconsideration opportunities.

features.name: Policy as Code Hiring Governance Layer
features.description: Codifies hiring rules and governance policies into automated system controls, ensuring consistent compliance across all hiring decisions.

features.name: Manager Calibration and Bias Drift Monitor
features.description: Tracks and alerts when hiring managers show inconsistent decision patterns or increasing bias over time, enabling early intervention.

features.name: Inappropriate Question and Bias Guard
features.description: Detects and warns against legally risky or biased interview questions before they're asked, protecting the company from compliance violations.

features.name: Fairness and Adverse Impact Copilot with Counterfactual What If
features.description: Analyzes hiring decisions for fairness and shows what-if scenarios to prevent discriminatory outcomes before they impact candidates.

features.name: Audit Pack Generator for Decisions
features.description: Generates comprehensive documentation packages to legally defend hiring decisions if challenged in disputes or audits.

features.name: Global Multi Entity Hiring Rules Engine
features.description: Applies consistent hiring rules across multiple countries and legal jurisdictions, ensuring global compliance with local employment laws.

features.name: Explainable AI Compliance Agent (Category-defining bet)
features.description: Provides clear, understandable explanations for AI-driven hiring recommendations, ensuring transparency and legal defensibility.

features.name: Bias Mitigation Agent
features.description: Automatically identifies and reduces unfair patterns in how AI models rate or rank candidates across demographic groups.

features.name: Autonomous Candidate Fraud Detector
features.description: Scans applications for forged credentials, falsified experience, or identity fraud to protect hiring integrity.

features.name: Geopatriation Data Residency Router
features.description: Routes candidate data storage to comply with regional privacy laws, ensuring data stays in the correct geographic location.

features.name: NYC Local Law 144 Bias Auditor
features.description: Ensures hiring practices comply with NYC's pay transparency and bias audit requirements for local operations.

features.name: PII Redaction & Blind Hiring Enforcer
features.description: Automatically removes personal identifying information from applications to enable fair, unbiased blind hiring reviews.

features.name: Worker Council (Betriebsrat) Compliance Agent
features.description: Ensures all hiring decisions comply with German works council requirements and employee consultation obligations.

features.name: Applicant Fraud and Identity Verification Neutralizer
features.description: Verifies candidate identity and screens for misrepresentation to prevent hiring fraud and ensure legitimate applicants.

features.name: Cross-Entity Global Compliance Guardian
features.description: Maintains consistent hiring compliance standards across all company divisions and countries operating under different regulations.

features.name: DEI Decision Auditor Agent
features.description: Audits hiring decisions against diversity and inclusion goals, documenting that selections were legally defensible and unbiased.

features.name: Bias Drift Detector
features.description: Continuously monitors AI models to catch when bias gradually emerges, triggering corrective action before it affects hiring.

features.name: Global Offer Compliance Guardian
features.description: Validates job offers against salary requirements, legal minimums, and local regulations for each geography before finalizing.

features.name: Interviewer Calibration & Drift Monitor
features.description: Monitors interview panel consistency and alerts when individual interviewers show rating bias or pattern drift over time.

features.name: DEI Fairness Simulator & Auditor
features.description: Simulates hiring scenarios and audits actual outcomes to identify and eliminate fairness gaps before they cause legal exposure.

features.name: End-to-End AI Decision Audit Trail
features.description: Creates complete, traceable records of every AI decision, enabling legal teams to reconstruct how each hiring choice was made.

features.name: Bias & Drift Monitor for Models and Workflows
features.description: Monitors both AI models and human workflows for emerging bias and performance drift, maintaining fairness standards continuously.

features.name: Confidence-Driven Escalation Thresholds
features.description: Routes low-confidence hiring recommendations to human review, preventing risky automated decisions from proceeding unsupervised.

features.name: End-to-End Hiring Evidence Vault
features.description: Securely stores all hiring evidence, documentation, and decision records for audit defense and regulatory compliance.

features.name: Immutable Decision Timeline
features.description: Creates permanent, unchangeable records of when each hiring decision was made and by whom, preventing tampering or rewriting history.

features.name: Audit Replay Mode
features.description: Allows legal and compliance teams to replay and examine past hiring decisions as they existed at any point in time.

features.name: Versioned Requisition Snapshotting
features.description: Preserves snapshots of job requirements and criteria as they change over time, documenting the basis for each hiring decision.

features.name: AI Change Impact Diff
features.description: Tracks exactly what changed when AI systems or decision rules are updated, documenting impact on candidate outcomes.

features.name: Litigation Hold for Hiring Records
features.description: Preserves all hiring records indefinitely when litigation is threatened, ensuring evidence cannot be inadvertently deleted.

features.name: Counsel and Procurement Evidence Export
features.description: Exports hiring evidence packages in formats legal counsel and procurement auditors require for disputes or investigations.

features.name: Stage-Level Adverse Impact Monitor
features.description: Monitors hiring stages for discrimination patterns that unfairly eliminate candidates based on protected characteristics.

features.name: Pre-Go-Live Fairness Gate
features.description: Blocks deployment of hiring tools until fairness testing confirms no unacceptable bias or discrimination exists.

features.name: Criteria Health Check for Job Relevance
features.description: Verifies that job selection criteria directly match job requirements, ensuring hiring is based on relevant qualifications only.

features.name: Drift and Feedback-Loop Monitor
features.description: Detects when feedback loops or previous hiring patterns begin unfairly influencing current candidate evaluations.

features.name: Accommodation-Safe Alternative Flow Engine
features.description: Ensures candidates with disabilities receive accommodations during hiring while maintaining fair evaluation processes.

features.name: Risk-Based Approval Chains for AI Automation
features.description: Routes high-risk hiring decisions through stricter approval chains to ensure proper oversight and reduce errors.

features.name: Two-Person Review for High-Risk Filters
features.description: Requires two independent reviewers to approve high-risk filtering criteria before they eliminate candidates from consideration.

features.name: Override with Mandatory Reason Capture
features.description: Requires hiring managers to document reasons when they override AI recommendations, creating accountability and audit trails.

features.name: AI Recommendation Quarantine Queue
features.description: Holds AI-generated candidate recommendations in a review queue before they affect decisions, allowing human verification first.

features.name: Policy-Aware Agent Boundaries
features.description: Configures AI agents to stay within defined policy boundaries and cannot recommend actions that violate company hiring rules.

features.name: Jurisdiction-Aware Hiring Policy Engine
features.description: Automatically applies different hiring rules based on the specific country and laws where each position is located.

features.name: Built-In DPIA and Impact Assessment Workspace
features.description: Provides built-in templates and tools to complete privacy impact assessments required by data protection regulations.

features.name: Works Council and Consultation Packager
features.description: Packages hiring information and decisions in formats required for worker council reviews and regulatory consultations.

features.name: Aligned-Criteria Library (Job-Relatedness Guardrails)
features.description: Maintains a library of pre-vetted, legally defensible job criteria and guardrails to prevent biased or irrelevant selection standards.

features.name: Immutable Hiring Decision Ledger
features.description: Records every hiring decision in an immutable ledger that cannot be altered, ensuring permanent auditability.

features.name: Standardized Audit Export Toolkit
features.description: Provides standardized exports of hiring evidence and audit data in formats regulators, courts, and auditors expect.

features.name: AI Audit Readiness Scorecard
features.description: Scores how well hiring systems meet legal compliance requirements, identifying gaps before audits uncover them.

features.name: Continuous Impact Assessment Engine
features.description: Continuously measures hiring impact across demographics to catch discrimination emerging in real-time, not retroactively.

features.name: Configurable Fairness Objectives Per Role
features.description: Lets each job role define its own fairness targets and metrics, rather than applying one-size-fits-all standards.

features.name: Adaptive Bias Monitoring With Drift Detection
features.description: Adapts bias monitoring as hiring patterns evolve, automatically detecting emerging discrimination without manual reconfiguration.

features.name: Candidate Demographic Voluntariness And Segregated Use
features.description: Ensures candidates freely choose to share demographic data and that information is used only for compliance, not decision-making.

features.name: Human‑Final Decision Enforcement
features.description: Enforces that human judgment makes the final hiring decision, preventing fully automated candidate rejection.

features.name: Escalation Paths For High‑Risk Decisions
features.description: Routes risky hiring decisions up the chain to senior review before proceeding, reducing company legal exposure.

features.name: Oversight Workbench For Compliance And Legal
features.description: Provides a dedicated workbench for compliance and legal teams to oversee hiring decisions and investigate concerns.

features.name: Structured Human Justification Capture
features.description: Captures structured explanations from humans when they make hiring decisions, creating defensible documentation of reasoning.

features.name: Granular AI Feature Consent Management
features.description: Lets each candidate consent to specific AI features before they're used to evaluate them, respecting individual preferences.

features.name: Sensitive Modality Governance (Video/Voice/Psychometrics)
features.description: Provides special governance for sensitive data like video interviews, voice analysis, or personality assessments.

features.name: Jurisdiction‑Aware Workflow Engine
features.description: Routes hiring workflows differently based on location laws, automatically adapting processes for each jurisdiction.

features.name: Regulation Template Library And Playbooks
features.description: Provides pre-built templates and playbooks for complying with hiring regulations in different countries and regions.

features.name: Compliance Change Alerting And Simulation
features.description: Alerts hiring teams when new laws emerge and simulates how changes would impact current hiring practices.

features.name: Immutable "Decision Chain of Custody"
features.description: Records exactly who made each decision, what data was considered, and when, creating an unbreakable evidence chain.

features.name: AI Interaction Audit Logs (Not Just User Logs)
features.description: Logs every interaction with AI systems—not just user actions—to show how recommendations were generated and applied.

features.name: Real-Time Adverse Impact Monitoring
features.description: Monitors hiring in real-time to immediately flag discrimination patterns that would violate employment law.

features.name: Mandatory Human Review Gate (MRG)
features.description: Forces human review of every hiring decision before it can be finalized, preventing unchecked automated rejections.

features.name: "Human Override" Attribution
features.description: Documents exactly which hiring decisions humans overrode and why, creating accountability and audit evidence.

features.name: Two-Person Rule for Model Deployment
features.description: Requires two separate approvers before any AI model or hiring algorithm can be deployed to live decisions.

features.name: Granular, Per-Model Consent Management
features.description: Manages consent for each AI model separately, allowing candidates to opt out of specific algorithms while accepting others.

features.name: Jurisdiction-Specific Workflow Automation
features.description: Automatically customizes hiring workflows and rules based on the specific country and legal requirements of each position.

features.name: Automated OFCCP Reporting Suite
features.description: Generates required federal contractor reporting automatically, documenting hiring practices for OFCCP compliance audits.

features.name: GDPR Article 22 "Significant Decision" Flagging
features.description: Flags hiring decisions that significantly impact candidates under GDPR rules, ensuring full transparency and rights protection.

features.name: EU AI Act Risk Tiering
features.description: Classifies AI hiring tools by risk level under EU AI Act requirements, ensuring appropriate oversight for high-risk systems.

features.name: "Opt-Out of AI" Path
features.description: Provides candidates an option to opt out of AI evaluation entirely and request human review instead.

features.name: Immutable Tool-Call Provenance Ledger
features.description: Records exactly which AI tools and systems were used in each hiring decision, creating full transparency and traceability.

features.name: Six-Year Retained Compliance Archive
features.description: Stores all hiring records and evidence for six years to satisfy legal hold requirements and audit needs.

features.name: Automated EEOC/Title VII Audit Extractor
features.description: Automatically extracts hiring data relevant to EEOC and Title VII compliance inquiries and litigation.

features.name: Policy Evaluation Reconstructive Search
features.description: Reconstructs how hiring policies were applied to individual candidates, proving fair and consistent treatment.

features.name: Time-Stamped Decision Boundary Snapshots
features.description: Creates timestamped snapshots of selection criteria at each decision point, documenting the basis for each choice.

features.name: Knockout Filter Disparate Impact Simulator
features.description: Tests whether knockout screening questions unfairly eliminate candidates based on protected characteristics before deployment.

features.name: Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Forced Justification Prompt
features.description: Prompts hiring managers to explain their reasoning before finalizing decisions, ensuring thoughtful consideration and accountability.

features.name: EU AI Act Annex III Risk Classifier
features.description: Analyzes hiring tools against EU AI Act risk categories, ensuring they meet all required transparency and governance standards.

features.name: DPIA Pre-Filled Compliance Exporter
features.description: Pre-fills data protection impact assessment forms using hiring system information, streamlining regulatory documentation.

features.name: Dynamic Geographic Posting Adapter
features.description: Adapts job postings and visibility based on location laws, ensuring compliant recruiting practices in each region.

features.name: Multi-Jurisdictional AI Notice Automator
features.description: Automatically generates AI use notices required by different jurisdictions and includes them in candidate communications.

features.name: Candidate-Facing Data Source Receipt
features.description: Sends candidates documentation of data sources and information used to evaluate them, meeting transparency requirements.

features.name: AI Accommodation Request Router
features.description: Routes accommodation requests from candidates through appropriate channels, ensuring fair and timely assistance.

features.name: Plain-Language Algorithmic Transparency Portal
features.description: Shows hiring teams exactly how AI makes decisions in plain language, ensuring transparency and compliance with regulation requirements.

features.name: EU AI Act auto-conformity package
features.description: Automatically ensures the system meets EU AI Act requirements for responsible hiring algorithms and documentation.

features.name: Four-fifths automated impact report
features.description: Generates automated reports measuring whether hiring outcomes meet the four-fifths rule, protecting against discrimination claims.

features.name: Human risk-threshold gates
features.description: Creates automatic checkpoints requiring human review when decisions might pose legal or fairness risks.

features.name: Immutable workflow replay
features.description: Preserves complete, unalterable records of every step in the hiring workflow for audit and legal defense purposes.

features.name: Annual bias-audit automation
features.description: Runs annual automated checks to detect and report any hidden biases in hiring decisions and processes.

features.name: Real-time Bias Detection Dashboard
features.description: Monitors hiring patterns in real-time to spot and alert teams to potential bias before it affects decisions.

features.name: Automated Evidence Pack Generation
features.description: Automatically assembles complete evidence packages showing hiring decisions were fair and legally defensible.

features.name: Configurable Human-in-the-Loop Triggers
